name: prismaxim
description: Extract audio from YouTube (or a file), separate it into stems with Demucs, and remix in a studio-style browser mixer. Separation and YouTube extraction run in the browser or on an optional Node backend.

scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w web
scripts.build:mobile: npm run build -w shared && npm run build:mobile -w web
scripts.sync:mobile: npm run build:mobile && npm run sync -w mobile
